title: salix × sibyllina
intro: Salix × sibyllina, also known as Sibbald's willow or hybrid willow, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Salix, resulting from the cross between Salix alba (white willow) and Salix fragilis (crack willow). The medicinal properties of Salix × sibyllina include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its salicylic acid content. This plant has been found to provide various health benefits, such as alleviating headaches, fever reduction, and aiding in the management of menstrual cramps. Salix × sibyllina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or salve, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
